definitions.text: An outdoor area containing one or more types of plants, usually plants grown for food or ornamental purposes.
Such an ornamental place to which the public have access.
examples: You can spend the afternoon walking around the town gardens.

definitions.text: Taking place in, or used in, such a garden.
To grow plants in a garden; to create or maintain a garden.
examples: I love to garden—this year I'm going to plant some daffodils.

definitions.text: Of a batsman, to inspect and tap the pitch lightly with the bat so as to smooth out small rough patches and irregularities.
